name: Python 2 Print
suggestion: Use print() function for Python 3 compatibility.

name: Mutable Default Arguments
description: Detects mutable default arguments in Python functions.
suggestion: Use 'None' as default and initialize inside the function.

name: Python eval/exec
description: Detects use of eval() or exec() in Python.
suggestion: Avoid using eval/exec as they are major security risks. Use safer alternatives like ast.literal_eval if necessary.

name: Broad Exception
suggestion: Catch specific exceptions instead of a general Exception.

name: Missing Colon
description: Detects missing colons at the end of control statements.
message: Syntax Error: Missing colon ':' at the end of control statement.
suggestion: Add a colon ':' at the end of the statement.

name: Unresolved TODOs
message: Unresolved TODO or FIXME comments found.
suggestion: Address the pending task or remove the comment if it's no longer relevant.
